mapper.select:
SELECT r.REQ_ID AS requestId, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS targetDate, r.REQ_TYPE AS reqType, r.REQ_GROUP AS reqGroup, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, r.STATUS AS requestStatus, te.EMP_CODE AS targetEmpCode, te.EMP_NAME AS targetEmpName, td.DEPT_NAME AS targetDeptName, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType, o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE AS changeShiftCode, s.SHIFT_NAME AS changeShiftName, a.STEP_NO AS myStepNo, a.STATUS AS myStatus, CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), a.DECISION_AT, 120) AS myDecisionAt, a.REJECT_REASON AS rejectReason FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 a JOIN HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r ON a.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND a.REQ_ID = r.REQ_ID JOIN HRIMASTER01 te ON r.COMPANY = te.COMPANY AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = te.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 td ON te.COMPANY = td.COMPANY AND te.DEPT_CODE = td.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON r.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE WHERE a.COMPANY = #{company} AND a.APPROVER_EMP_CODE = #{approverEmpCode} AND a.STEP_TYPE = 'APPROVE' AND a.STATUS = #{stepStatus}
AND r.STATUS = 'SUBMITTED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 prev WHERE prev.COMPANY = a.COMPANY AND prev.REQ_ID = a.REQ_ID AND prev.STEP_TYPE = 'APPROVE' AND prev.STEP_NO < a.STEP_NO AND prev.STATUS <> 'APPROVED' )
AND r.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장')
AND r.REQ_TYPE = '휴일근무'
AND r.REQ_TYPE IN ('조퇴', '외근', '외출', '전반차', '후반차')
AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER'
AND r.TARGET_DATE >= CAST(#{fromDate} AS DATE)
AND r.TARGET_DATE <= CAST(#{toDate} AS DATE)
AND te.EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
ORDER BY r.TARGET_DATE DESC, r.REQ_ID

SELECT r.REQ_ID AS requestId, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS targetDate, r.REQ_TYPE AS reqType, r.REQ_GROUP AS reqGroup, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, r.STATUS AS requestStatus, te.EMP_CODE AS targetEmpCode, te.EMP_NAME AS targetEmpName, td.DEPT_NAME AS targetDeptName, re.EMP_CODE AS requesterEmpCode, re.EMP_NAME AS requesterEmpName, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType, o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE AS changeShiftCode, s.SHIFT_NAME AS changeShiftName FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r JOIN HRIMASTER01 te ON r.COMPANY = te.COMPANY AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = te.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 td ON te.COMPANY = td.COMPANY AND te.DEPT_CODE = td.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRIMASTER01 re ON r.COMPANY = re.COMPANY AND r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE = re.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON r.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE WHERE r.REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND r.COMPANY = #{company} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 a WHERE a.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND a.REQ_ID = r.REQ_ID AND a.APPROVER_EMP_CODE = #{approverEmpCode} AND a.STEP_TYPE = 'APPROVE' )
mapper.update: UPDATE HRTATTENDANCE_APPROVAL01 SET STATUS = 'REJECTED', DECISION_AT = GETDATE(), REJECT_REASON = #{rejectReason}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND STEP_NO = #{stepNo}
